shots.title: Sprint state schema + read/write helpers

hazards.description: Committed T1 directly to main before creating feature branch

shots.notes: Created sprint-state.ts with SprintState schema, load/save/updateGate/isSprintComplete/pendingGates helpers. Added GuardName union + 3 GUARD_DEFINITIONS entries.

shots.title: sprint-completion guard with multi-hook dispatch
shots.notes: Single handler branching on hook_event_name. Updated guard dispatcher to handle multi-definition guards by matching hookEvent from stdin.

shots.title: State writers + sprint CLI command
shots.notes: Integrated updateGate into validate, review, workflow-gate, review-tier. Created slope sprint start/gate/status/reset CLI.

shots.title: Tests + next-action integration + test fixes

hazards.description: 3 existing tests broke: guard count (17→20), unique names (multi-hook), windsurf adapter (Stop exclusion logic), registry (new command file)

shots.notes: 33 new tests. Fixed guard.test.ts count+uniqueness, windsurf adapter exclusion logic, registry. next-action defers to sprint-completion when sprint-state active.

conditions: First multi-hook guard (3 GUARD_DEFINITIONS for one handler)
Guard dispatcher needed update for multi-definition name matching
yardage_book_updates: Multi-hook guards need unique name+hookEvent pairs, not unique names
Adding GUARD_DEFINITIONS entries breaks guard count assertion and uniqueness test
Windsurf adapter exclusion test assumes guards with unsupported events are fully excluded — not true for multi-hook guards
course_management_notes: Review findings (4 minor + 1 moderate) all addressed in a follow-up commit
T1 committed on main before branch — branch-before-commit guard caught it for T2 onward
slope_factors: New guard pattern (multi-hook) required dispatcher update
